description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
The Mercedes-Benz was traveling eastbound on Condensa Street at the merge of the eastbound Central Expressway.  The driver of the 
Mercedes-Benz was yielding to cross-traffic and came to a complete stop as he waited for an opening to merge. The driver of the Mazda 
following the Mercedes-Benz did not come to a stop and contacted the Mercedes-Benz at the rear bumper. The Mazda was travel <5mph at 
the time of contact with the Mercedes-Benz. No injuries were incurred and both parties were able to drive away from the incident. 
Print
Clear Form
